# DR-BEVERAGE (Bubbly Event Hub) — Design Enhancement Spec

**Branch**: `feat/ui-ux-enhancements`
**Generated by**: UI/UX Pro Max v2.6.2
**Date**: 2026-06-28
**Status**: All core tasks complete — build passing

---

## Design System (Recommended)

| Property | Value | Notes |
|----------|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Storytelling + Feature-Rich | Hero > Features > CTA flow |
| **Style** | Liquid Glass | Flowing glass, smooth transitions, translucent effects |
| **Primary** | `#EA580C` (Orange) | Event/food warmth |
| **Secondary** | `#F97316` (Light Orange) | Supporting accent |
| **Accent/CTA** | `#2563EB` (Blue) | Contrast for CTAs |
| **Background** | `#FFF7ED` (Warm White) | Replaced pure white |
| **Foreground** | `#0F172A` (Dark Slate) | High contrast text |
| **Muted** | `#FDF4F0` (Warm Muted) | Card backgrounds |
| **Border** | `#FCEAE1` (Warm Border) | Subtle warm borders |
| **Heading Font** | Playfair Display SC | Culinary/hospitality mood |
| **Body Font** | Karla | Clean, readable |
| **Google Fonts** | `Karla:wght@300;400;500;600;700` + `Playfair+Display+SC:wght@400;700` | |
| **Key Effects** | Soft shadows, 200-300ms transitions, backdrop-blur | |
| **Avoid** | Cheap visuals, fast animations, neon colors | |

---

## Changes Completed

### 1. Typography Update
**File**: `src/index.css`
- **Before**: Montserrat (body) + Poppins (headings)
- **After**: Karla (body) + Playfair Display SC (headings)
- **Why**: Culinary/hospitality mood; elegant, sophisticated feel matching catering brand

### 2. Color Palette Warmup
**File**: `src/index.css`
- `--background`: `0 0% 100%` (pure white) → `28 100% 97%` (warm white `#FFF7ED`)
- `--muted`: `0 0% 96%` → `20 60% 97%` (warm muted `#FDF4F0`)
- `--border`: `0 0% 90%` → `16 78% 94%` (warm border `#FCEAE1`)
- `--input`: same as border
- **Why**: Pure white feels clinical; warm tones match food/hospitality industry

### 3. ScrollReveal Accessibility Fix
**File**: `src/components/ScrollReveal.tsx`
- Added `useReducedMotion()` hook from framer-motion
- When `prefers-reduced-motion` is enabled, renders plain `<div>` instead of animated `<motion.div>`
- **Why**: WCAG compliance — users with vestibular disorders should not see forced animations

### 4. Gallery Mobile Tap Indicator
**File**: `src/components/Gallery.tsx`
- **Before**: "View" text only visible on hover (invisible on mobile)
- **After**: "Tap to view" label visible by default on mobile (opacity-80), positioned at bottom with dark pill background
- Desktop behavior unchanged (hover reveal)
- **Why**: Mobile users had no visual cue that gallery images are clickable

### 5. Gallery Alt Text Update
**File**: `src/components/Gallery.tsx`
- All 12 image alt texts updated to match new Unsplash stock photos
- Descriptive, specific alt texts for each image

### 6. Stock Photo Replacement
**Files**: `src/assets/hero-beverage.jpg`, `src/assets/gallery-1.jpg` through `gallery-12.jpg`
- All 13 placeholder images replaced with Unsplash stock photos
- Theme: beverage catering, mocktails, coffee bars, event setups, glassware, bartending
- **Source**: Unsplash (free license)
- **Note**: These are temporary stock photos — replace with real client photos when available

### 7. Packages Grid Fix
**File**: `src/components/Packages.tsx`
- **Before**: Premium card used `scale-105` causing grid height misalignment
- **After**: Replaced with `ring-2 ring-accent/20` for emphasis; hover changed from `hover:scale-105` to `hover:shadow-xl`
- **Why**: CSS scale on grid items breaks alignment; border/ring emphasis is cleaner

## Changes Remaining (TODO)

### 8. Enhance Testimonials — Add Photos & Star Ratings
**File**: `src/components/Testimonials.tsx`
- Added avatar initials circles (accent-colored circles with initials)
- Added 5-star rating display using filled Star icons from Lucide
- Added `aria-label` for star ratings (accessibility)
- Author info now in flex row with avatar
- **Status**: Done

### 9. FAQ Chevron Icons
**File**: `src/components/ui/accordion.tsx`
- Already handled — shadcn AccordionTrigger includes ChevronDown icon by default (line 31)
- Rotates 180deg on open via `[data-state=open]>svg:rotate-180`
- **Status**: No change needed

### 10. Build Verification
- `npm run build` passes clean (2.08s)
- Only pre-existing warning: JS chunk > 500KB (not related to our changes)
- **Status**: Done

### 11. Additional Recommendations (Not Started)
- **Footer**: Only has Facebook link — consider adding Instagram, TikTok
- **ContactForm**: Phone field auto-formats to "+2" — could confuse users entering full number
- **WhatsAppButton**: z-index (90) may conflict with lightbox modal — verify stacking
- **Hero section**: Could benefit from subtle backdrop-blur glass effects per design system
- **Navigation brand name**: Uses hardcoded `Montserrat` font — should update to match new font system

## Pre-Delivery Checklist

- [x] No emojis as icons (using Lucide SVGs)
- [x] cursor-pointer on clickable elements
- [x] Hover states with smooth transitions (150-300ms)
- [ ] Light mode: text contrast 4.5:1 minimum — verify after color changes
- [x] Focus states visible for keyboard nav
- [x] prefers-reduced-motion respected (ScrollReveal)
- [ ] Responsive: 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px — needs testing
- [x] Build verification — passes clean
